title: Excalibur | Hold My Items Support
description: Hold My Items compatibility fix for Excalibur
body:
![Mod's Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bf0ddc46cc2f967f21cb4bbeb49b7f87df4a5d7.png)

This **unofficial** compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Hold My Items Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)[/Neoforge](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items-reforged) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Features:**

*   Retextures every vanilla bucket item (water, lava, snow, axolotl, pufferfish, etc).
*   The in-hand shovel model was updated so the player holds it correctly. No more weird shovels!

For the best experience, use this pack alongside Excalibur.

**Credits:**

*   Maffhew – Creator of _Excalibur_
*   EnyLow – Creator of _Hold My Items_
*   Bene2212\_ – Creator of _Hold My Items Reforged_

If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-hold-my-items-support)
